skills.name: Threat Model Generator
skills.description: Generate STRIDE-based threat models for applications with mitigations and risk ratings.
skills.useCase: Identify security threats early in design
skills.promptPreview: Create a STRIDE threat model for [application description]. Include threat scenarios, risk ratings, and recommended mitigations.

skills.name: Security Code Review Checklist
skills.description: Generate language-specific security review checklists covering OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
skills.useCase: Catch security issues during code review
skills.promptPreview: Generate a security code review checklist for [language/framework]. Cover OWASP Top 10, input validation, auth, and data exposure.
